column2: Verify that a Shop Owner can confirm, prepare, and hand over orders within their shop; that invalid workflow transitions are blocked; and that payment status gates handover actions (UC-13).
Shop Owner confirms a paid order
column3:
1. Log in as Shop Owner.
2. Navigate to Order Management.
3. Find an order with status PENDING_PAYMENT that has been paid.
4. Click "Xác nhận đơn hàng".
column4: Order status changes to CONFIRMED; the action is timestamped; customer receives an order update notification.
column5: A paid order with status PENDING_PAYMENT exists for this shop.

column2: Shop Owner marks an order as PREPARING
column3:
1. Log in as Shop Owner.
2. Find a CONFIRMED order.
3. Click "Bắt đầu chuẩn bị".
column4: Order status changes to PREPARING; the timestamp is recorded.

column2: Shop Owner hands over a prepared order to delivery staff
column3:
1. Log in as Shop Owner.
2. Find a PREPARING order.
3. Click "Bàn giao giao hàng" / "Hand over".
column4: Order status changes to DISPATCHED; a delivery assignment is created for the assigned Delivery Staff; customer is notified.
column5: A PREPARING order exists with an assigned delivery staff member.

column2: Attempt to hand over an order that has NOT been paid
column3:
1. Log in as Shop Owner.
2. Find an order with payment status PENDING (bank transfer not yet confirmed).
3. Attempt to click "Bàn giao" or advance the order status past CONFIRMED.
column4: System blocks the action; an error message is shown ("Đơn hàng chưa được thanh toán"); order status remains unchanged.
column5: Order exists with payment status still PENDING.

column2: Shop Owner can only view and manage orders belonging to their shop
column3:
1. Log in as Shop Owner A.
2. Navigate to Order Management.
3. Attempt to access or modify an order that belongs to Shop Owner B (by direct URL or API call).
column4: Shop Owner A cannot see or modify Shop Owner B's order; access is denied with a 403 or a redirect.
column5: Two separate active shops with separate orders exist.

column2: Customer cancels an order before it is CONFIRMED
column3:
1. Log in as a Customer.
2. Navigate to Order History.
3. Find a PENDING_PAYMENT order.
4. Click "Hủy đơn hàng".
column4: Order status changes to CANCELLED; reserved inventory is released; if payment was completed a refund is initiated or flagged.
column5: Order is in PENDING_PAYMENT and payment has not been confirmed yet.

column2: Verify order status is visible in Order History with correct status labels
column3:
1. Log in as a Customer.
2. Navigate to Order History.
3. Verify that orders from multiple workflow stages are shown with the correct Vietnamese status labels.
column4: All orders are shown with correct statuses: Chờ thanh toán, Đã xác nhận, Đang chuẩn bị, Đang giao, Đã giao, Đã hủy. Status filter works correctly.
column5: The Customer has orders in at least 3 different status states.
